should_trigger: We have twelve agent tasks and the plan keeps causing rework because later research changes earlier architecture decisions. Use a matrix method to redesign the orchestration.
Help me sequence these product, backend, frontend, and data migration workstreams. Some can run in parallel, but I need to expose hidden dependencies and feedback loops.
Our auto-orchestrator has agents for retrieval, planning, coding, review, and evaluation. Map the dependencies and propose clusters or handoff contracts.
This workflow looks like a checklist, but every step depends on every other step. Find a better structure and identify bounded iteration loops.
should_not_trigger: Pick the highest priority feature from this list using impact versus effort scoring.
Summarize what Design Structure Matrix means in one paragraph for a glossary.
edge_cases: There are only four tasks, but two of them keep changing each other's requirements. Decide whether DSM is worth using or whether a simple loop contract is enough.
I do not yet know all the tasks in this project. Help me decide what discovery pass is needed before building a dependency matrix.
